rationale_by_leg.claude: Broadest faithful coverage: three well-sourced top stories (Moonshot K3 pause, Qwen3.8 2.4T open-weight, Nvidia/Nebius) plus a DRAM infra card whose every figure ($3,100-3,400, 146%, ~$1,380, Meritz, Saudi sovereign buyers) traces exactly to the snapshot. All spot-checked claims (KernelBench 14.82x, legal 26.7/14.2, SemiAnalysis 2.8T/10-days) verify. Best move: separates Qwen's verified launch/2.4T (multi-source, official RT + AndrewCurran) from the unverified 'beats GPT-5.6' ranking. Minor: one slightly padded aggregator-benchmark headline; run_id 'manual'. Strong, nuanced skepticism throughout.
rationale_by_leg.zai-glm-5p2: Cleaner and deeper on Moonshot (paid-sub throttle, second-day persistence, labeled Huawei speculation) and uniquely includes the enterprise-prompt privacy quick hit. But it misses two snapshot stories: the DRAM surge entirely, and Qwen as a real launch. Decisive flaw: it claims 'No official @Alibaba_Qwen announcement was captured in the snapshot' — false; the official RT and AndrewCurran's corroboration are present. It then fires a 2.4T Qwen headline via aggregator @kimmonismus while its own body says the figure 'should not be repeated as fact' — an internal contradiction. Correct run_id.

Both top stories (Moonshot K3 pause, Nvidia/Nebius) verify verbatim, and the Grok/VulcanBench skepticism is sound. But A wrongly asserts 'No official @Alibaba_Qwen announcement was captured in the snapshot' — the official Qwen post (2.4T, open-weight, 'second only to Fable 5') is present. A then contradicts itself: it lists the 2.4T Qwen figure as a headline alert while telling readers not to repeat it, and its Telegram omits Qwen entirely. Result: a genuine top story is buried in the skeptic's corner, DRAM squeeze is missed, and a factual sourcing error dents faithfulness.
rationale_by_leg.claude: Covers all three major threads as ranked story cards (K3 pause, Qwen3.8 open-weight launch, GPU/DRAM squeeze) plus the parallel memory data. Every distinctive claim spot-checked verifies exactly: DRAM $3,100-3,400/146%/$1,380/Meritz/Saudi, SemiAnalysis KDA 10x, teortaxes '155/slightly below GPT-5.6 Luna' and 'qwen max is nowhere near Kimi.' Model skepticism: separates verified launch/param facts from unverified 'beats GPT-5.6' ranking with independent cross-source corroboration. Headlines are specific and alert-worthy; digest/Telegram/headlines are internally consistent. Minor: teortaxes number slightly simplified.
